mapper.select: select id, user_email, user_password, user_phone, user_type, user_name, user_intro, user_visit_count, user_latest_login, user_state, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_user order by id desc limit 3

select id, store_market_id, store_owner_id, store_name, store_intro, store_address, store_score, store_state, store_is_confirmed, created_datetime, updated_datetime from tbl_store order by id desc limit 3

select i.id, i.item_store_id, i.item_category_id, i.item_name, i.item_type, i.item_stock, i.item_price, i.item_delivery_fee, i.item_content, i.item_state, i.item_view_count, i.created_datetime, i.updated_datetime, c.category_name from tbl_item i left join tbl_category c on i.item_category_id = c.id order by i.id desc limit 3
select count(*) from tbl_payment where payment_state = 'COMPLETED'
